attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt missed. Ehsan Haddad (Jordan) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Nizar Al Rashdan.

events.description: 伊桑·哈达德射门偏出。 尼扎尔-拉什丹参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Konrad Laimer (Austria).
Attempt saved. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Odeh Fakhoury.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射正。 奥德·法库里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. David Alaba (Austria) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right.
Offside, Austria. Konrad Laimer is caught offside.
Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Xaver Schlager (Austria).
Corner, Austria. Conceded by Mohammad Abu Al Nadi.
Foul by Konrad Laimer (Austria).
Attempt saved. Odeh Fakhoury (Jordan) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Noor Al Rawabdeh.

events.description: 奥德·法库里射正。 努尔-拉瓦比德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Jordan. Conceded by Alexander Schlager.
Attempt blocked. Marcel Sabitzer (Austria) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Sasa Kalajdzic.

events.description: 马塞尔·萨比策射门被封堵。 莎莎·卡拉季奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Konrad Laimer is caught offside.

events.description: 罗马诺·施密德 进球，泽维尔·施拉格 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Jordan. Conceded by David Alaba.
Ali Olwan (Jordan) hits the bar with a header from the left side of the six yard box. Assisted by Mohannad Abu Taha with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 阿里·奥尔文射门偏出。 阿布-塔哈参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Phillipp Mwene.

events.description: 莎莎·卡拉季奇射门偏出。 姆韦内参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Stefan Posch (Austria) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left.
Attempt saved. Ali Olwan (Jordan) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Ehsan Haddad with a headed pass.

events.description: 阿里·奥尔文射正。 伊桑·哈达德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria).
Foul by Nizar Al Rashdan (Jordan).
Foul by Xaver Schlager (Austria).
Foul by Phillipp Mwene (Austria).
Corner, Jordan. Conceded by Stefan Posch.

Attempt missed. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Odeh Fakhoury following a set piece situation.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射门偏出。 奥德·法库里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Ehsan Haddad.

events.description: 穆萨·阿尔塔马里射门偏出。 伊桑·哈达德参与进攻。

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Marcel Sabitzer.

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Austria 1, Jordan 0.
